title: celastrus lineatus
intro: Celastrus lineatus, also known as the staff vine or Indian staff, is a perennial climber native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Celastrus lineatus include its potential to improve cognitive function, boost immunity, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds and roots are often used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
